J(t)] (3) The Joint Secretary (Border Management) shall be the convener of the Committee. (4) Search-cum-Selection Committee shall regulate it's own procedure for selecting the Chairperson and the other whole-time Members. (5) The Chairperson and other whole-time Members may be selected on deputation or contract basts through an open advertisement. (6) bi case the appointment is on deputation basis, - (i) a person who is in the service of the Govemmeni of India or of a State Government shall not be appointed as the Chairperson of the Authority unless such person has held- (A) a post equivalent to that of Additional Secretary to Ihe Government of India; or r (B) Joint Secretary to the Government of India or equivalent for a period of not less than five years; and (ii) • a person who is in the service of Government of India or of a State Government shall not be appointed as whole time Member of the Authority unless such person has held- (A) a post equivalent to the Joint Secretary to the Government of India; or (B) Director to the Government of India or equivalent for a period of not less than four years. (4) In case the appointment is on contract basis, the eligibility shall be determined by the Search-cum-Selectton Committee: 5. Salary and allowances.- (1) The Chairperson shall be paid salary and allowances as admissible to the post of Additional Secretary to the Government of India. (2) The Member (Planning and Development) and the Member (Finance) shall be paid salary and allowances as admissible to the post of Joint Secretary to the Government of India. 6. Fee. - Every other Member, who is not a whole- time Member or an ex-officio Member or a representative of a State Government, shall be paid a lump sum amount not exceeding Rs. 3500/- as fee for each day he attends the meetings of the Authority or of any Committee duly constituted by the Authority. 7. Residential accommodation. - (1) The Chairperson and the other two whole-time Members shall be entitled to residential accommodation to be provided by the Authority which would be at par with the Officers of equivalent status in the Centra] Government. -- 3 of 12 -- im# Ml *mti ^i tfsm : ararnrcor 31 i s : Iri ea$e of accommodation is arranged by trie Authority tjati pesK^tft 11$ deducted from the salary of ^CJ^irpe^®r^ or m hsuwifont stowsriee shall toe paid to him 0 ) la € i # aseMpraodatioii is sot s t a g e d fey fee Authority to ifft&^yeifev^ide-iimeM^ife ^Chairperson ai^su^h otter may fee^, sfcall be fsli hp@use reiit^afiowanse- at feej®m ©fitted p r sest ©fihts baps a t i e tf « $ # $ & - The vehicle used % rfte €^£t^r^e$i mi ft« Metfubc^ fer pshfilte purposes shall be regulated in accordance wiife. f. i^&sm&l Government in this regard from timem ttefe 0, t*nwttti^ Allowance and daily allowances;. - (1) TThe: Chal^ffsettt times Miftibers; sterf) be entitled to travelling allowance and daily, aliowaass :«& $ t e ntes asMaipiflifeafefe to the equivalent officers of the Govemmew §f Mia* (2> E w y ex-officio Member or a representative ©fs* $&te C*0VeiasB.ejwl:.s|iti! be enlitlM to W^Jlfeig allowance and daily allowance from the ^OureM ten: #itiett ; » h member dri^S: |»3: salary at the rates admissible to him. according. & the Wfes ..«*f llss m*qffici6 Members and Members:-Kp*aeatia^ ^&s^'i&ffl/m&t&m& be entitled for accomrnQdaiibn according tto thsSir eligibility at"•$& ataMing, tf such meeting is held outside tl^headquaater o| M&Rberi, ffebitbray class-*te tJrgsiW '.^ffr'ftgtd fe.&S&:oY''te W m$3mm and the -pliee of.'tte ineWi% of tret A u t e i % m *& e> t'if3i(0 in Air Conditioned-! class by train orW& 4W^^-^i^:0M'Wdn fa mt existent shall be admissible and such Members *gh#fl disss 'be.eligible fm mmmm^km^ as eligible for Joint Secretary level, offer® of tfee :0ois^5sest of fedlg atJfcpfe^Mmeeting of the Authority or its Comfnitrsevas the^ases ma^bci 10.
